title: NetworkValidationState
description: Output of the honeyhive-cli sanity check / network validation. Written to state/network-validation.json. Read by runtime validation and Phase 1 setup.

status.description: pass if reachability succeeded, fail otherwise. Downstream phases refuse to run on fail.

hh_api_key_source.description: Where the key was found — env (environment variable) or config_file (~/.honeyhive/config.json).

deployment_type.description: Inferred from the URL pattern. Feeds dedicated-deployments.md logic.

probe_method.description: Whether the check used the CLI or curl fallback.

probe_http_status.description: HTTP status code from the curl probe. Null when CLI was used.

tls_error.description: SSL/TLS error string, if any. Null on success.

failure_reason.description: Human-readable reason for failure. Null on success.

validated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when validation ran.
